steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: A species is "tall" if its fully-grown height h satisfies h > 100 cm. The correct answer is the range where every value exceeds 100.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — $107 \lt h \lt 158$: every value exceeds 100. ✓
  • Choice B — $50 \lt h \lt 100$: no value exceeds 100. ✗
  • Choice C — $40 \lt h \lt 95$: no value exceeds 100. ✗
  • Choice D — $16 \lt h \lt 91$: no value exceeds 100. ✗
That confirms A is correct.
